name: Gladiator Metals Corp.
description: Gladiator Metals Corp. is a Canada-based mineral exploration company focused on the identification, acquisition, and evaluation of high-grade copper projects in the Yukon, Canada. The company's flagship project is the Whitehorse Copper Project, an advanced-stage copper-gold-silver-molybdenum project located in the Whitehorse Mining District. Gladiator Metals is committed to creating shareholder value through systematic exploration and development of its mineral properties in safe and mining-friendly jurisdictions.
